hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "A file was just modified. Check if the README needs to be updated to reflect this change."}}'
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null || true

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && ! echo "$f" | grep -q '/tests/' && source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null && if python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "pytest passed."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "pytest FAILED. Review test output and fix before committing."}}'; fi || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then source venv/bin/activate 2>/dev/null; if ! ruff check . 2>&1; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Ruff check failed. Fix linting errors before committing."}'; exit 2; fi; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'pytest|python -m pytest'; then [ -f .env ] || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "Warning: .env file not found. Tests require ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and will fail without it."}}'; fi
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreCompact", "additionalContext": "Before compacting, ask the user if there is anything specific they want preserved or highlighted in the summary."}}'
